race.comment: DAVIKAR (7) has been just behind the placegetters in both efforts this time in work and looks to be working up to another victory. Is one from one around this circuit and should be right there at the business end. CHICAGO KING (6) has a handy record over this distance range with a win and four placings from seven attempts and will be rock-hard fit for this. Has the ability to test this line-up. COOL MUSIC (2) has hit a purple patch of late with three wins and two placings from her past five outings and it's hard to knock mares in form. Has to be included in calculations. BRUCKHEIMER (1) saves his best form for his home circuit here with two wins and two seconds from just six spins. In the mix. PRESSALONG (3) rounds out the selections with the 2kg claim.
